name: Monday.com
description: Work operating system for teams: boards, tasks, automations, integrations and custom apps to manage projects and workflows.

auth_methods.note: Official monday.com API docs state you authenticate by providing an authorization token in the Authorization header, supporting both Personal API tokens (Authorization: <your_api_token>) and OAuth 2.0 access tokens (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>).

credential_access.note: The Developer Center docs explain creating apps and obtaining client_id/client_secret as well as generating personal API tokens from the product UI without requiring partner approval; support article shows how to create a personal API v2 token in the UI.

api_surface.note: monday.com exposes a GraphQL API at https://api.monday.com/v2 and developer docs and API reference show wide GraphQL schema to access boards, items, users and automations (GraphQL endpoint and examples present in official docs).

buildability.note: Developer docs and product UI allow self-service creation of personal API tokens and OAuth apps, and the GraphQL API endpoint is public in docs, so integration development can start immediately.

queries: monday.com developer API documentation root site:developer.monday.com OR site:monday.com "API" "developer" "monday"
site:developer.monday.com "How to get your API token" "monday"
monday.com API token "how to get" site:monday.com OR site:developer.monday.com
